name: my-oracle-cloud-workspace devcontainer
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p /home/vscode/.oci && if [ -n "$OCI_API_KEY_PRIVATE" ]; then printf '%s' "$OCI_API_KEY_PRIVATE" > /home/vscode/.oci/oci_api_key.pem && chmod 600 /home/vscode/.oci/oci_api_key.pem; else echo 'OCI_API_KEY_PRIVATE not set; skip writing key'; fi
postStartCommand: if [ -f /home/vscode/.oci/oci_api_key.pem ]; then echo 'OCI API key present at /home/vscode/.oci/oci_api_key.pem'; else echo 'OCI API key missing'; fi
